---
title: "404"
page-layout: article
comments: false
---

# Oops! Page Not Found

It looks like you've stumbled upon a page that doesn't exist. How did you get here? Was it:

-   A typo in the URL?
-   A broken link?
-   A glitch in the matrix?

Don't worry, it happens to the best of us. Here's what you can do next:

-   [Go Back Home](index.qmd)
-   [Check Out My Resume](resume/index.qmd)
-   [Look At My Resume](projects/index.qmd)
-   [Read My Blog](blog/index.qmd)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

*P.S. If you keep ending up here, it might be a sign that the internet is broken. Try turning it off and on again.*
